scripts.bundle:debug: npm run sidecar:install && tauri build --debug; bash scripts/fix-recall-framework-symlinks.sh "src-tauri/target/debug/bundle/macos/HQ Sync.app" && bash scripts/sign-bundle.sh "src-tauri/target/debug/bundle/macos/HQ Sync.app"
scripts.bundle:release: npm run sidecar:install && tauri build; bash scripts/fix-recall-framework-symlinks.sh "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/HQ Sync.app" && bash scripts/sign-bundle.sh "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/HQ Sync.app"
